markets.title: Will ETH trade above $5,000 before July 1?
markets.resolution: Resolves YES if ETH/USD on Gemini is above $5,000 at any time before July 1 2026 00:00 UTC.

markets.title: Will BTC go below $50,000 this week?
markets.resolution: Resolves YES if BTC/USD on Gemini trades below $50,000 before Friday close.
